signal.description: diapr.ai continuous continuation idles on stale run instead of dispatching next PM turn

evidence.value: Reporter diapr.ai. Project repo: /Users/shivamtiwari.highlevel/VS Code/1008apps/diapr.ai. Framework version observed through agentxchain status protocol v4. Completed parent run: run_954fc3dc8164adc2. Last QA turn: turn_ffcd79c5a79d8555. Accepted integration ref: git:40e6ec32ac00caf5ce43bfd40312be0be6a67d1b. Completed at: 2026-05-02T04:48:53.324Z. Status after completion showed phase=qa, status=completed, active_turns={}, pending_intents=[], delegation_queue=[], next_recommended_role=null, but next_actions reported roadmap_open_work_detected for ROADMAP M8 line 97 care-streak freeze. Attempted command: agentxchain run --continue-from run_954fc3dc8164adc2 --inherit-context --continuous --vision .planning/VISION.md --auto-approve --auto-checkpoint --auto-retry-on-ghost --reconcile-operator-commits auto_safe_only --session-budget 250 --max-runs 100 --max-idle-cycles 3 --poll-seconds 30 --verbose. Observed result: continuous_session cont-39964d1f started/resumed but status immediately showed idle_cycles=3/3, current_run_id=run_0b00ed1aa694dda8, current_vision_objective=null, no active turn, no dispatch events after 2026-05-02T04:48:59 except continuous_session_resumed at 2026-05-02T06:07:59 against stale run_0b00ed1aa694dda8. Expected result: continuation should derive next roadmap work from completed run_954fc3dc8164adc2 and dispatch PM or the configured next role, not attach to stale earlier run_0b00ed1aa694dda8. Impact: full-auto continuation appears idle/no active turns even though open roadmap work remains. Workaround used: run non-continuous continuation after ensuring actor-owned dirty files are clean: agentxchain run --continue-from run_954fc3dc8164adc2 --inherit-context --role pm --max-turns 1 --auto-approve --auto-checkpoint --verbose. That successfully created run_92726b2ff343c746 and PM turn turn_48c477f22fcaec1d.
